info.name: Telehealth API
info.description:
# Telehealth API — Modular Postman Collection

## How Credentials Work

1. **Login as Patient** or **Login as Doctor** — the test script auto-captures the JWT and sets `currentToken` + the role-specific token variable.
2. All requests inherit the collection-level `Bearer {{currentToken}}` auth — no manual header copying needed.
3. Use **🔄 Activate Patient Token** or **🔄 Activate Doctor Token** (in the Auth folder) to switch the active role mid-session without re-logging in.

## Collection Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `baseUrl` | API base URL (default: `http://localhost:3000`) |
| `currentToken` | Active JWT — auto-set by login requests |
| `patientToken` | JWT captured from patient login |
| `doctorToken` | JWT captured from doctor login |
| `userId` | Auto-set after login / register |
| `patientId` | Auto-set after patient login |
| `doctorId` | Auto-set after doctor login |
| `appointmentId` | Set after creating an appointment |
| `notificationId` | Set from notification list |
| `rxId` | Set after adding a prescription |
| `blockedSlotId` | Set after blocking a doctor slot |

## Seeded Demo Credentials

| Role | Email | Password |
|---|---|---|
| Doctor | `doctor1@demo.com` | `password123` |
| Doctor | `doctor2@demo.com` | `password123` |
| Patient | `patient1@demo.com` | `password123` |

variable.description: API base URL — change to production URL when deploying
Active JWT token used for all authenticated requests. Auto-set by Login requests.
JWT captured from the most recent Patient Login
JWT captured from the most recent Doctor Login
Current user's ID — auto-set after login
Patient profile ID — auto-set after patient login
Doctor profile ID — auto-set after doctor login
Set from the first notification returned by GET /notifications
Prescription ID — auto-set after adding a prescription
Blocked slot ID — auto-set after blocking a doctor slot

item.name: 🏥 Health
item.description: Liveness and readiness checks — no auth required.

request.description: Returns `{ status: 'ok', timestamp }`. No auth required.
Pings the Neon PostgreSQL database. Returns `{ status: 'db connected' }` or `500` on error.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description:
Authentication endpoints plus role-switching helpers.

**Flow:**
1. Run `Login as Patient` or `Login as Doctor` — token auto-captures.
2. Use `🔄 Activate Patient Token` / `🔄 Activate Doctor Token` to switch mid-session.

exec: console.log('✅ Patient registered and token saved');

request.description:
Register a new patient account. Role must be `patient` or `doctor`.

**Auto-captures:** `patientToken`, `currentToken`, `userId`, `patientId`

exec: console.log('✅ Doctor registered and token saved');

request.description:
Register a new doctor account.

**Auto-captures:** `doctorToken`, `currentToken`, `userId`, `doctorId`

exec: console.log('✅ Patient token saved → currentToken updated');

request.description:
Login with seeded patient credentials.

**Seeded:** `patient1@demo.com` / `password123`

**Auto-captures:** `patientToken`, `currentToken`, `userId`

exec: console.log('✅ Doctor 1 token saved → currentToken updated');

request.description:
Login as Dr. Maria Santos (Cardiologist).

**Seeded:** `doctor1@demo.com` / `password123`

**Auto-captures:** `doctorToken`, `currentToken`, `userId`

exec: console.log('✅ Doctor 2 token saved → currentToken updated');

request.description:
Login as Dr. Jose Reyes (General Practice).

**Seeded:** `doctor2@demo.com` / `password123`
Returns the authenticated user's profile from the JWT. Requires `currentToken` to be set.

exec: console.warn('⚠ patientToken is empty — run "Login — Patient" first');
// Abort the actual request (it's just a helper)
throw new Error('Role switched to Patient — this request intentionally aborted');

request.description:
**Helper — not a real API call.**

Sets `currentToken` to the saved `patientToken`. Run this to switch the active role to Patient mid-session.

The pre-request script switches the token and aborts the request so you don't hit the server.

exec: console.warn('⚠ doctorToken is empty — run "Login — Doctor" first');
throw new Error('Role switched to Doctor — this request intentionally aborted');

request.description:
**Helper — not a real API call.**

Sets `currentToken` to the saved `doctorToken`. Run this to switch the active role to Doctor mid-session.

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description:
User profile management and avatar upload.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user. Users can only update/upload for their own ID.

request.description: Fetch a user by their UUID. Uses `{{userId}}` — set this after login.
Update user profile fields (firstName, lastName, phone). Only the user themselves can update their own profile.

formdata.description: JPG, PNG, or WebP — max 5 MB

request.description:
Upload a profile picture. Uploaded to Cloudinary. Accepts `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp` — max 5 MB.

Use `form-data` body with key `file`.

item.name: 🧑‍⚕️ Patients
item.description:
Patient profile management (medical history, emergency contact, etc.).

**Auth:** Requires `patientToken` (`currentToken` must be set to patient JWT).

request.description:
Retrieve a patient's full profile including medical history.

**Tip:** After running, `patientId` is auto-captured.
Update patient medical information. Partial updates supported — only send fields you want to change.

item.name: 👨‍⚕️ Doctors
item.description:
Doctor discovery, profile management, availability, and slot blocking.

**Role notes:**
- `GET` endpoints: any authenticated user
- `PUT`, `POST`, `DELETE` on a doctor's own resources: requires doctor role (`doctorToken`)

exec: // Auto-save first doctor ID for downstream requests

request.description:
Paginated list of all doctors. Optional query filters:
- `specialization` — e.g. `Cardiology`
- `search` — searches name and bio
- `page`, `limit` — pagination (default: 1, 20)

**Auto-captures:** `doctorId` from first result
Get a single doctor's full profile including availability summary.
Update a doctor's profile. **Must be logged in as the doctor** (`doctorToken` active).
Returns the doctor's weekly availability schedule (day of week + time windows).

body.raw:
[
  { "dayOfWeek": "monday",    "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "17:00", "isAvailable": true },
  { "dayOfWeek": "tuesday",   "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "17:00", "isAvailable": true },
  { "dayOfWeek": "wednesday", "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "13:00", "isAvailable": true },
  { "dayOfWeek": "thursday",  "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "17:00", "isAvailable": true },
  { "dayOfWeek": "friday",    "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "17:00", "isAvailable": true },
  { "dayOfWeek": "saturday",  "startTime": "09:00", "endTime": "12:00", "isAvailable": false }
]

request.description:
Replace the doctor's weekly schedule. **Doctor role required.**

`isAvailable: false` marks the day as off even if a time window is provided.

query.description: YYYY-MM-DD — must be a future date

request.description:
Returns available 30-minute booking windows for a specific date. Excludes already-booked slots and blocked slots.

**Required query param:** `date` in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

List all manually blocked time slots for this doctor.

**Auto-captures:** `blockedSlotId` from first result.

Block a specific datetime slot. **Doctor role required.**

**Auto-captures:** `blockedSlotId`

Remove a previously blocked slot. **Doctor role required.**

Uses `{{blockedSlotId}}` — auto-set by Block or Get Blocked Slots.

item.name: 📅 Appointments
item.description:
Appointment lifecycle: book, list, view, reschedule, cancel, and update status.

**Role notes:**
- Create: patient only
- List / Get: any authenticated user (results filtered by role)
- Patch status: doctor only
- Delete/cancel: either role

request.description:
Book a new appointment. **Patient role required.**

`scheduledAt` must be a future ISO timestamp. `durationMinutes` defaults to 30 if omitted.

**Auto-captures:** `appointmentId`

exec: // Save first appointment ID if not already set

request.description:
List appointments for the current user. Results are automatically filtered by role:
- **Patient** → their own appointments
- **Doctor** → appointments assigned to them

Optional `status` filter: `pending`, `confirmed`, `completed`, `cancelled`
Get a single appointment's full detail. Both the patient and the doctor can access their shared appointment.

Update appointment status. **Doctor role required.**

Valid transitions:
- `pending` → `confirmed`
- `confirmed` → `completed`

Status values: `pending`, `confirmed`, `completed`, `cancelled`
Cancel an appointment. Either the patient or the doctor can cancel. An optional `reason` can be provided in the body.

item.name: 📝 Consultation Notes
item.description:
Consultation notes are scoped to an appointment.

**Base path:** `/api/appointments/:appointmentId/notes`

**Auth:** Doctor can create/update; both roles can read.

request.description: Retrieve the consultation note for a specific appointment. Returns `404` if no notes exist yet.

body.raw:
{
  "chiefComplaint": "Patient presents with chest pain and shortness of breath on exertion.",
  "diagnosis": "Stable angina pectoris",
  "treatmentPlan": "Lifestyle modification, low-dose aspirin, and follow-up stress test in 2 weeks.",
  "followUpDate": "2026-06-16T09:00:00.000Z",
  "additionalNotes": "Advised patient to monitor blood pressure daily and report any acute episodes."
}

request.description:
Create or update (upsert) consultation notes. **Doctor role required.**

This endpoint is idempotent — calling it again updates the existing note.

item.name: 💊 Prescriptions
item.description:
Prescriptions are scoped to an appointment.

**Base path:** `/api/appointments/:appointmentId/prescriptions`

**Auth:** Doctor can add/remove; both roles can read.

request.description:
List all prescriptions for a specific appointment.

**Auto-captures:** `rxId` from first result.

body.raw:
{
  "medicationName": "Aspirin",
  "dosage": "81mg",
  "frequency": "Once daily with meals",
  "duration": "90 days",
  "instructions": "Take with a full glass of water. Do not crush or chew."
}

request.description:
Add a prescription to an appointment. **Doctor role required.**

**Auto-captures:** `rxId`

Remove a specific prescription. **Doctor role required.**

Uses `{{rxId}}` — auto-set by Add Prescription or Get Prescriptions.

item.name: 🔔 Notifications
item.description:
In-app notifications (also pushed via Pusher). Notifications are created automatically on appointment events.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user (own notifications only).

request.description:
Returns the current user's notifications with `unreadCount`.

**Auto-captures:** `notificationId` from first result.
Mark all of the current user's notifications as read in one call.
Mark a single notification as read. Uses `{{notificationId}}` — auto-set by Get Notifications.

item.name: 🤖 AI
item.description:
AI-powered doctor recommendations based on symptoms (Gemini).

**Auth:** Patient role only.

exec: // Save first recommended doctorId for downstream booking
console.log('📌 doctorId updated from recommendation:', firstDoc.id);

request.description:
Sends symptoms to Gemini and returns matched specializations + available doctors.

**Patient role only.**

**Auto-captures:** `doctorId` from the first recommended doctor — ready for appointment booking.
